title: Can Anthropic Survive Taking On Trump's Pentagon?
summary_full: In an unprecedented dispute between the US government and a private business, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has declared Anthropic a supply chain risk -- a measure usually reserved for companies from adversary nations, like China's Huawei.
